# GitHub repo settings — apply in repo Settings after pushing

**Description** (short):
Open standard for contract intelligence data — parties, clauses, obligations, risks, dates, and financial terms.

**Website**:
https://docfide.com

**Topics**:
contract, schema, contract-intelligence, legal-tech, json-schema, clm, contracts, obligations, risk-management

**Social preview**:
Create a 1280×640px image with the Condicio logo and text
"Open standard for contract intelligence data" and save it as
`.github/social-preview.png` in this repo.

To apply: go to repo Settings → General → Social preview → Upload image.
